name: Zoho Voice
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Zoho Voice
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for Zoho Voice with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Zoho Voice for call lookups, support handoffs, workflow updates, and safe internal voice operations.
intro: Zoho Voice helps teams manage business calling, call activity, and phone-based workflows. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Zoho Voice workflow you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill for customer support or internal team agents. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions and take bounded action in Zoho Voice while staying within your security and approval rules.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up recent Zoho Voice call activity so it can confirm whether a support callback was completed.
Use a support agent to create a callback task or follow-up workflow after a customer requests phone assistance in chat or by ticket.
Have the agent summarize call status, assigned owner, or call outcome from Zoho Voice before preparing a human handoff.
Let the agent collect missing callback details from the customer and update the approved record or workflow tied to a Zoho Voice interaction.
Use the agent to trigger an escalation workflow when a customer asks for urgent phone contact or requests a supervisor callback.
internalUseCases: Enable employees to chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or an internal chat tool to look up Zoho Voice call records, statuses, and recent activity.
Let support and operations teams ask the agent to prepare callback queues, summarize missed-call follow-up needs, and organize next steps from Zoho Voice data.
Help managers use an internal AI assistant to review call outcomes, identify unresolved follow-ups, and generate handoff notes for team workflows.
Allow employees to start approved voice-related workflows through chat, such as assigning follow-up ownership or escalating high-priority callback requests.
Support SOP execution by letting team members ask the agent how to handle missed calls, callback delays, or routing exceptions while it references internal guidance and Zoho Voice context.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that checks callback status from Zoho Voice during live customer conversations.
A helpdesk assistant that prepares phone support handoff notes using Zoho Voice activity and ticket context.
An internal operations agent that summarizes missed calls and assigns approved follow-up workflows.
A team assistant that retrieves Zoho Voice call details inside Slack or Microsoft Teams.
A customer support bot that gathers callback preferences and updates approved records safely.
An escalation assistant that triggers urgent phone support workflows based on customer requests and rules.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with Zoho Voice, such as checking callback status, preparing handoffs, or triggering follow-up workflows, and it turns that goal into a Skill design.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it safely
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder decides the safest workflow, identifies the configuration values the connection needs, handles authentication and secret protection through secure runtime configuration, and keeps credentials out of chats and Skill source by design.

howItWorks.title: Permissions stay scoped
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder limits the Skill to the minimum Zoho Voice actions, records, users, and systems needed for the workflow, and it adds approval boundaries wherever a lookup, update, or trigger should be reviewed before action.

howItWorks.title: It tests real scenarios
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios against the Skill, finds bugs, missing guardrails, weak instructions, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is improved and validated, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot chat widget, helpdesk agent, or private employee agent so teams can use Zoho Voice actions in a controlled way.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent for Zoho Voice?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Zoho Voice workflow you want in plain language, and DocsBot designs the Skill, secures the connection, tests scenarios, and prepares it for deployment. The finished agent can perform approved lookups, updates, summaries, and workflow triggers based on your rules.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Zoho Voice data during customer conversations?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use Zoho Voice data to check call status, review recent activity, prepare callback handoffs, or trigger approved follow-up workflows while replying to customers. You control what the agent can access and where approval is required.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with Zoho Voice?
faq.answer: Teams can automate callback lookups, missed-call follow-up checks, escalation preparation, support handoff summaries, and approved callback workflow triggers. This helps the agent move from answering questions to completing the next safe step.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees work with Zoho Voice?
faq.answer: Yes, employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve call information, summarize follow-up needs, assign next steps, and complete approved voice-related workflows. This is useful in internal chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Zoho Voice actions secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the required configuration, protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime settings, scopes permissions to the minimum necessary access, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive actions. That keeps credentials out of conversations and limits what the agent can do.

faq.question: Can DocsBot prepare call handoffs and escalation notes from Zoho Voice activity?
faq.answer: Yes, a Skill can gather Zoho Voice context, summarize relevant call history, and generate clean handoff or escalation notes for support teams. This helps agents route issues faster without asking staff to compile the details manually.

brand.title: Zoho
brand.description: Zoho is a privately held software company headquartered in Chennai, India, that provides a comprehensive suite of over 55 cloud‑based applications for businesses of all sizes. Its products cover sales and marketing, customer support, collaboration, finance, and recruitment, helping more than 130 million users worldwide streamline operations and focus on growth. Zoho emphasizes user privacy, operates without an ad‑revenue model, and offers both free and paid tools designed to transform the way companies work.
brand.slogan: Zoho One: The operating system for business, uniting teams and efficiency.
